title: hydrocotyle pterocarpa
intro: Hydrocotyle pterocarpa, also known as the water pennywort or kanglaite, is a type of aquatic plant native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle pterocarpa include improving liver function, reducing fatigue, and enhancing cognitive function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements. Hydrocotyle pterocarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
